string.text:
The Mosin Nagant is a five-shot, bolt-action, internal magazineв fed military rifle. Known officially as the 3-line rifle M1891 and informally in Russia and former Soviet Union as Mosin's rifle (ISO 9: vintovka Mosina), it is primarily found chambered for its original 7.62Г—54mmR cartridge.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] PU Scope
